channel.title: DATA NEWS - Home - Comment Feed
channel.description: The latest comments left on "Home" on the Lordship Lane Primary School website.
channel.generator: Juniper education Content Management System (CMS) Version: 4.5 (junipereducation.org)

item.title: DSi
item.description: DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS! DS!

item.title: New Website Launched
item.description: Welcome to our brand new school website! We have created the website to keep parents up to date with school news and notices, and to showcase some of the great things our pupils are achieving.

item.title: Autumn Concert Highlights
item.description: Pupils from Years 3-6 performed a stunning set of seasonal music at our annual autumn concert. Families were amazed by the progress and enthusiasm shown on stage.

item.title: Winter Charity Drive
item.description: Our school community came together to collect donations for local charities. Thank you to everyone who contributed and volunteered their time.
